That's kind of how in a way I felt when I made money because they're like oh my god, freedom, travel, like everything. And then of course the reality is like you actually don't know what the fuck you're doing and you make money sometimes and you lose money and you're stressed and it takes a while to really figure it out. But that feeling of when you first kind of like figure it out man, it's the best feeling in the road. So try to like anchor to that feeling while you guys are here for the next couple of days. That feeling of like kind of excitement and being so.
